'''dhayasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalade|scalade]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalade|scalade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhayasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæyæsæth|dhæyæsæth]] || [[word:dhæyæsæj|dhæyæsæj]] || [[word:dhæyæsæsh|dhæyæsæsh]] || [[word:dhæyæsæ|dhæyæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayayasath|dhayayasath]] || [[word:dhayayasaj|dhayayasaj]] || [[word:dhayayasash|dhayayasash]] || [[word:dhayayasa|dhayayasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayasath|dhayasath]] || [[word:dhayasaj|dhayasaj]] || [[word:dhayasash|dhayasash]] || [[word:dhayasa|dhayasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayafsath|dhayafsath]] || [[word:dhayafsaj|dhayafsaj]] || [[word:dhayafsash|dhayafsash]] || [[word:dhayafsaf|dhayafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhayasatha|dhayasatha]] || [[word:dhayasaja|dhayasaja]] || [[word:dhayasasha|dhayasasha]] || [[word:dhayasaka|dhayasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhayasath|dhayasath]] || [[word:dhayasaj|dhayasaj]] || [[word:dhayasash|dhayasash]] || [[word:dhayasa|dhayasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhayasathal|dhayasathal]] || [[word:dhayasajal|dhayasajal]] || [[word:dhayasashal|dhayasashal]] || [[word:dhayasakal|dhayasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhayasathatha|dhayasathatha]] || [[word:dhayasajaja|dhayasajaja]] || [[word:dhayasashasha|dhayasashasha]] || [[word:dhayasaka|dhayasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhayasathan|dhayasathan]] || [[word:dhayasajan|dhayasajan]] || [[word:dhayasashan|dhayasashan]] || [[word:dhayasakan|dhayasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhayasathaoro|dhayasathaoro]] || [[word:dhayasajaoro|dhayasajaoro]] || [[word:dhayasashaoro|dhayasashaoro]] || [[word:dhayasakaoro|dhayasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
